changeSet.author: druchek

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM [quiz] WHERE title = 'Relational Fundamentals') AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM [quiz] WHERE title = 'SQL/Schema Design') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END;

rollback.sql: DELETE FROM question WHERE quiz_id IN ( SELECT id FROM quiz WHERE title IN ('Relational Fundamentals', 'SQL/Schema Design', ''Final Assessment') );
